Compliance Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE: Atty. ROBIN G. WORKMAN, ESQ. of Workman Law Firm, PC, Tel No. 415-782-3660 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. The Court rules as follows: As to the Compliance Hearing, the Court states for the record that all required distributions under the approved settlement have been made. No formal order required. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Continued To Sep-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Compliance Hearing is continued to September 17, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 to be heard by Judge Goldsmith. Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/JKS)

Atty. ERIC S. BEANE of DLA Piper, LLP, Tel No. (310) 595-3005 appearing for Defendant Utiliquest, LLC.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY H. ALLEN'S Application For Order Granting Final Approval Of Class Settlement; Approving Request For Claims Administrator Fee; Approving Request For Attorney's Fees And Costs; And Approving Request For Incentive Payment To Class Representative Jeffrey Allen is granted.
